action.reasoning: Observation: PEFT/LoRA training is blocked by Qwen visual dtype/parameter issues after wrapping, while native packaged Qwen inference works. Analysis: the fastest recovery is to avoid PEFT entirely and do a small native partial fine-tune of only the last language layers, saving a compact trainable-parameter delta that predict.py/model.py can load on top of the packaged base. Decision: rewrite model.py/train.py for robust native delta loading/training, train a short 400-sample 1-epoch last-2-layers checkpoint, and submit it immediately to measure whether fine-tuning improves over the 0.0278 baseline.
action.command: python -m py_compile model.py train.py predict.py && python train.py --max_samples 400 --epochs 1 --train_last_n 2 --output_dir checkpoints/qwen_partial_400
